source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for playful product UI with Noto Sans guidance for multilingual catalog labels and compact item metadata.
layout: Precise 8px catalog grids, cap-spot badges, gill dividers, woodland panels, and clear browsing hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent mushroom motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a fly agaric mushroom, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A fly agaric mushroom with red cap, cream white spots, pale stem, visible gill texture, subtle forest green reflected tones, dark soil-free base detail, and crisp realistic silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full cap and stem without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves red cap color, cream spots, and tactile fungal texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no woodland background, no moss bed, no second mushroom, no fantasy props.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Mushroom" derived from the visible transparent fly agaric mushroom cutout.
Reference use: This light design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the red cap, cream spots, pale gills, forest green support tones, and woodland floor warmth in the visible mushroom cutout.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Mushroom, Fly Agaric, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese product UI examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Show catalog product UI guidance.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line/bar charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style playful catalog design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, 8px card radius, cream surfaces, red cap primary actions, cream spot badges, gill dividers, forest green navigation, subtle woodland texture, playful but usable hierarchy.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: agaric red, cream spots, forest green, moss light, gill beige, stem taupe, dark soil, and forest ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Mushroom" or "Fly Agaric".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Mushroom design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: This dark design-system board is the source reference for coding any future theme together with the light board. Use the visible transparent fly agaric cutout and the visible light-mode Morphous Mushroom board as references. Preserve the mushroom palette roles, playful catalog component language, red cap actions, cream spot badges, gill dividers, forest-green navigation, woodland texture, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact wide landscape 16:9 composition, 3840 x 2160 4K-class board, no portrait crop, no square crop.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution source board, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Mushroom, Fly Agaric, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from forest ink and dark soil, readable text from spore cream, primary accents from agaric red, navigation from forest green, highlights from cream cap spots and moss light, subtle gill and cap texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Mushroom" or "Fly Agaric".
